MINESEC Registered · GCE Centre No. 11972 · Est. 2007

Education with
a Vision.

Nursery, Primary, Secondary & Technical education across three campuses in Douala, Tombel, and Loum. Empowering the next generation of leaders through accredited, career-focused Anglo-Saxon education.

Education with
a Vision.

Oxford Academic Complex (OAC) was founded in 2007 by a team of seasoned educationists with a singular mission: to deliver purely Anglo-Saxon education that is accessible, rigorous, and grounded in moral integrity. What began as a single campus in Tombel, South West Region, has grown into a network of three campuses serving families in Douala (Bepanda), Tombel, and Loum.

OAC is a fully recognized MINESEC institution (Ministry of Secondary Education) and an official GCE Board Examination Center — Centre No. 11972. Our students sit for GCE Ordinary and Advanced Level examinations on-site, ensuring continuity and comfort during this critical period.

Our teaching staff are not just educators — a significant number are active GCE examiners with firsthand knowledge of marking schemes, examination techniques, and evolving syllabi. This gives OAC students a distinct advantage in their academic preparation. We operate in a calm, disciplined, and inclusive environment where every student, regardless of gender or background, is given equal opportunity to excel.

2007

Year Founded

Qualified Staff

Nursery & Primary

Foundational Education.

From their first day in Nursery 1 through to the First School Leaving Certificate, OAC students receive structured, high-quality instruction that prepares them for our renowned secondary streams.

Nursery Section

Our nursery program provides early childhood education in a safe, nurturing environment. Children develop foundational literacy, numeracy, creativity, and social skills through play-based learning guided by trained nursery educators. The curriculum follows the official Cameroon syllabi for anglophone nursery education.

English LanguageFrench LanguageMathematicsGeneral Knowledge+2 more
Duration:2 Years (Nursery 1 & 2)
Ages:Ages 3–5
Available at:Tombel, Loum

Lower Primary (Classes 1–3)

Lower primary builds on nursery foundations with structured lessons in core subjects. Students develop strong reading, writing, and arithmetic skills through an engaging, child-centered approach. Class sizes are kept small to ensure individual attention from our qualified teachers.

EnglishFrenchMathematicsGeneral Science+2 more
Duration:3 Years
Ages:Ages 6–8
Available at:Tombel

Upper Primary & Beyond (Classes 4–6)

Upper primary strengthens core academic competencies and prepares pupils for the transition to secondary education. Students sit for the Government Common Entrance, FSLC (First School Leaving Certificate), and are guided toward the most suitable secondary stream — General, Technical, or Commercial.

EnglishFrenchMathematicsScience+3 more
Duration:3 Years
Ages:Ages 9–11
Available at:Tombel
Secondary & Technical Education

Excellence in Secondary.

At the Douala-Bepanda campus, OAC offers three distinct secondary streams — each leading to nationally recognized GCE qualifications. As an official GCE Examination Center (Centre No. 11972), our students sit for their exams in the familiar environment of their own school.

General Education

1st & 2nd Cycle — Arts & Science

The General Education stream prepares students for GCE Ordinary Level (Form 5) and Advanced Level (Upper Sixth) examinations. Students choose between Arts and Science tracks, with rigorous instruction from faculty who are themselves GCE examiners. Our pass rates consistently rank among the highest in the Littoral Region.

  • Arts Stream: Literature, History, Geography, Economics, Religious Studies
  • Science Stream: Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Additional Mathematics
  • GCE O-Level Preparation (Forms 1–5)
  • GCE A-Level Preparation (Lower & Upper Sixth)

Technical Education

1st & 2nd Cycle — Industrial & Commercial

OAC's Technical stream provides career-oriented education for students who want to develop practical, marketable skills. Our programs are aligned with MINESEC's technical syllabi and prepare students for both GCE Technical examinations and direct entry into the workforce or higher technical institutions.

  • Accounting & Financial Management
  • Secretarial Administration & Office Practice
  • Marketing & Business Management
  • Computer Science & Information Technology

Commercial Education

1st & 2nd Cycle — Business Focus

The Commercial stream bridges academic theory with real-world business application. Students develop competencies in entrepreneurship, commerce, and financial management — skills that are highly valued in Cameroon's growing economy. Graduates are prepared for both higher education and immediate professional careers.

  • Commerce & Business Principles
  • Entrepreneurship & Small Business Management
  • Economics & Financial Literacy
  • Business Communication & Law

Official GCE Board Examination Center

Centre No. 11972 — Douala, Bepanda

Results & Milestones

Proven Excellence.

From a single campus in rural Tombel to a three-campus network producing nationally competitive GCE results — our track record speaks for itself.

Alumni Network

Since 2007

Years of Excellence

Founded 2007

Our Journey

2007

Founded in Tombel

OAC opens its doors in Tombel, South West Region, as a nursery and primary school with a vision for Anglo-Saxon educational excellence.

2010

Secondary School Launched

The secondary education program begins at the Tombel campus, offering General Education courses and preparing the first cohort for GCE O-Levels.

2013

Expansion to Douala

OAC establishes the Bepanda campus in Douala to serve the Littoral Region, offering Secondary, Technical, and Commercial education streams.

2015

GCE Centre Status Awarded

The Cameroon GCE Board officially recognizes OAC Douala-Bepanda as Examination Centre No. 11972 — a milestone validating institutional quality.

2018

Loum Campus Opens

OAC expands further into the Littoral Region with a purpose-built nursery facility in Loum, bringing quality early childhood education closer to more families.

2020

Technical Education Expansion

New streams in Computer Science, Financial Management, and Secretarial Studies are added to the Bepanda Technical campus.

2024

Record GCE Results

OAC achieves its highest-ever pass rates: 87% at O-Level and 82% at A-Level, with multiple distinctions in Technical subjects.

Our Campuses.

Three campuses across the South West and Littoral regions — each designed to provide a safe, disciplined, and modern learning environment tailored to its community.

Douala Campus — Bepanda

Littoral Region

The Douala-Bepanda campus is OAC's secondary and high school hub, located behind CAMTEL in the Bepanda Mallah neighbourhood. This campus houses the General, Technical, and Commercial education streams, and serves as the official GCE Board Examination Center (Centre No. 11972). It is the largest campus, with dedicated science laboratories, computer rooms, and examination halls.

Monday–Friday, 7:30 AM – 4:00 PM
+237 677 484 187
General Secondary (Arts & Science)Technical EducationCommercial EducationGCE O/A Level Center

Tombel Campus — Main Center

South West Region

Tombel is where OAC began in 2007 — our founding campus and institutional headquarters. Located on the Main Road in Tombel town, this campus offers the complete education pathway from Nursery through Secondary. It remains the heart of the OAC community and embodies the founding vision of accessible, high-quality anglophone education in a rural setting.

Monday–Friday, 7:30 AM – 4:00 PM
+237 677 484 187
Nursery (Nursery 1 & 2)Primary (Classes 1–6)Secondary Education

Loum Campus — Littoral Hub

Littoral Region

The Loum campus extends OAC's reach into the Littoral Region's second-largest city. Currently focused on early childhood education, this campus provides Nursery 1 and Nursery 2 programs in a purpose-built facility designed for young learners. It serves families in Loum and surrounding communities who want quality anglophone nursery education.

Monday–Friday, 7:30 AM – 2:00 PM
+237 677 484 187
Nursery 1Nursery 2
Testimonials

Voices of Our Community.

Parents, alumni, and students share their OAC experience — from the classrooms of Tombel to the examination halls of Bepanda.

“When we moved to Douala, finding a school that truly understood the Anglo-Saxon system was our top priority. OAC Bepanda delivered beyond our expectations. My son sat for his GCE O-Levels right at the school, and the teachers — many of them GCE examiners — prepared him exceptionally well. He passed with 8 papers on the first attempt.”

Mrs. Grace Etonde Mbella

Parent — Douala Campus

2024
Admissions

Join Our Community.

Admissions at Oxford Academic Complex are open year-round, with the main intake period beginning each September. Places are competitive — early registration is strongly encouraged to secure your child's spot.

Admission Requirements

To register your child at any OAC campus (Douala-Bepanda, Tombel, or Loum), please bring the following documents to the admissions office:

  • Previous academic report card — Original and one (1) photocopy
  • Birth certificate — Original and one (1) photocopy
  • Two (2) recent passport-size photographs
  • Photocopy of national identity card of parent or legal guardian
  • Medical certificate of fitness (for new students)

Flexible Payment:

Parents have the privilege to pay school fees at their convenience throughout the academic year. OAC understands the financial realities of families and does not turn students away for temporary payment delays.

Family Discount:

Fee reductions are available for families enrolling 4 or more children at OAC. Contact the bursar's office at any campus for details on eligible discounts.

Why Choose OAC

For over 17 years, families across the Littoral and South West regions have trusted OAC with their children's education. Here's why:

  • Purely Anglo-Saxon Education SystemEnglish-language instruction following the Cameroon GCE curriculum
  • GCE Examiners as TeachersFaculty who set and mark national examinations
  • Official MINESEC & GCE Center (No. 11972)Students sit exams at their own school
  • Conducive & Secure Learning EnvironmentFenced campuses with supervision from 7:30 AM to 4:00 PM
  • Most Flexible Payment Structure in the RegionPay fees at your convenience — no child sent home
  • Equal Opportunity for All StudentsGender equality and inclusive policies across all programs

Ensure your child's success.

Applications are heavily competitive for the upcoming academic year. Secure your spot by contacting our admissions office today.
